examples: A newsboy was screaming an extra.
The newsboy wore a warm cap on his head.
The newsboy problem with the random-fuzzy demand.
The newsboy delivering it to your house, the trucks that get it to the newstand, the margins the newstand makes on selling it to you.
Andrew Johnson, our first impeached President, was said to have waved around his pocket constitution so often that he resembled a newsboy hawking the daily paper.
